tasks.name: Full test suite regression check (source + normalization + excerpting)
tasks.prompt:
Run the full test suite for all completed engines:
  python -m pytest engines/source/tests/ engines/normalization/tests/ engines/excerpting/tests/ -v --tb=short
Report: total tests, passed, failed, skipped, any error details.
Do NOT modify any files.

tasks.name: Cross-engine contract and D-023 metadata flow verification
tasks.prompt:
Run the metadata flow verification:
  python3 scripts/verify_metadata_flow.py
Also check cross-engine contracts:
  PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8 python tools/check_cross_engine_contracts.py
Report findings to overnight/results/val-contracts/summary.md

tasks.name: Code quality scan: excerpting engine
tasks.prompt:
Scan all Python files in engines/excerpting/src/ for:
1. Regex using \d instead of [0-9] (Arabic-Indic digit safety)
2. .lower()/.upper()/.strip() called on variables that might contain Arabic
3. Bare except: handlers
4. Missing type hints on function signatures
5. Pydantic Field(None) pattern compliance
Write findings to overnight/results/cq-excerpting/summary.md with file:line for each issue.

tasks.name: Code quality scan: source + normalization engines
tasks.prompt:
Scan all Python files in engines/source/src/ and engines/normalization/src/ for:
1. Regex using \d instead of [0-9] (Arabic-Indic digit safety)
2. .lower()/.upper()/.strip() called on variables that might contain Arabic
3. Bare except: handlers
4. Missing type hints on function signatures
Write findings to overnight/results/cq-all/summary.md with file:line for each issue.

tasks.name: Map excerpting SPEC rules to test coverage
tasks.prompt: Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md sections 4 and 5 and extract every behavioral rule (numbered items, MUST/SHALL statements, invariants I-AC-*, I-CS-*, I-TU-*). Then read all test files in engines/excerpting/tests/ and match each SPEC rule to its test(s). Write a coverage matrix to overnight/results/test-cov-excerpting/summary.md showing which rules have tests and which lack tests. Current test count: 149.

tasks.name: Map source SPEC rules to test coverage
tasks.prompt: Read engines/source/SPEC.md section 4 and extract every behavioral rule. Then read all test files in engines/source/tests/ and match each SPEC rule to its test(s). Write a coverage matrix to overnight/results/test-cov-source/summary.md. Current test count: 566.

tasks.name: Map normalization SPEC rules to test coverage
tasks.prompt: Read engines/normalization/SPEC.md section 4 and extract every behavioral rule. Then read all test files in engines/normalization/tests/ and match each SPEC rule to its test(s). Write a coverage matrix to overnight/results/test-cov-normalization/summary.md. Current test count: 503.

tasks.name: Implement Phase 3.1 deterministic metadata assembly (9 functions + tests)
tasks.prompt:
TASK: Implement Phase 3.1 — Deterministic Metadata Assembly

Read engines/excerpting/CLAUDE.md first. Then read NEXT.md for the full directive.

SPEC AUTHORITY: engines/excerpting/SPEC.md §7.1 (lines 1397-1518) defines all 9 functions.
Layer attribution rules: SPEC §6.2 (lines 1261-1290), rules LA-1 through LA-4.

FILE TO IMPLEMENT: engines/excerpting/src/phase3_deterministic.py (currently stubs)
TYPE DEFINITIONS: engines/excerpting/contracts.py
TEST FACTORIES: engines/excerpting/tests/conftest.py

For each function, follow the SPEC algorithm EXACTLY:
- F-DET-1 compute_excerpt_id: format exc_{source_id}_{div_id}_{chunk_index}_{unit_index}
- F-DET-2 extract_primary_text: SUBSTRING (not split-rejoin), preserve all whitespace
- F-DET-3 compute_layer_attribution: LA-4 then LA-1 then LA-2 then LA-3 rule cascade
- F-DET-4 compute_content_types: deduplicated scholarly functions from segments
- F-DET-5 detect_quran_verses: ornate parentheses pattern + hadith/consensus markers
- F-DET-6 compute_page_range: physical page overlap via join_points
- F-DET-7 compute_word_offsets: pass-through
- F-DET-8 filter_relevant_footnotes: marker search in char range
- F-DET-9 compute_segment_indices: from TeachingUnit
- build_deterministic_excerpts: orchestrator creating ExcerptRecords

ALSO WRITE: engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase3_deterministic.py with at least 30 tests.
- Use conftest factories. Use real Arabic text from tests/fixtures/.
- Test both single-layer and multi-layer sources.
- Test split chunks (split_info present).
- Test Quran verse detection with real ornate parenthesis text.
- Test all 4 LA rules.

REGEX: Use [0-9] not \d. ARABIC: Never .lower()/.upper()/.strip() on Arabic.
D-023: Pass through ALL upstream metadata fields.

AFTER IMPLEMENTING:
1. python -m pyright engines/excerpting/src/phase3_deterministic.py
2. python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -x -v --tb=short
3. All 149 existing tests MUST still pass.
4. New tests: at least 30 functions.

tasks.name: Phase 3.1 edge case and Arabic fixture tests
tasks.prompt:
TASK: Write additional edge case tests for Phase 3.1 deterministic functions.

Read engines/excerpting/CLAUDE.md first. Read NEXT.md. Read the existing tests in engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase3_deterministic.py.

Write additional tests to engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase3_deterministic.py (append to existing file, do not overwrite):

1. Multi-layer attribution: sharh + matn + hashiyah (3 layers, LA-3 path)
2. Split chunk handling: split_info.chunk_index affects excerpt_id
3. Layer split point merging: consecutive segments at split boundary
4. Empty footnotes list: no footnotes in chunk
5. Quran verse with diacritics in ornate parentheses
6. Hadith marker detection: test all patterns (rawahu, akhrajahu, etc.)
7. Consensus marker detection: test all patterns (ajma'u, ijma', etc.)
8. Single-word teaching unit: start_word == end_word
9. Very long text (>1000 words): verify offsets are correct
10. Primary text extraction preserving paragraph breaks (\n\n)

Use real Arabic text from tests/fixtures/ wherever possible.
Run: python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -x -v --tb=short
All tests must pass.

tasks.name: Pyright type-check Phase 3 files
tasks.prompt:
Run pyright type checking on all Phase 3 files:
  python -m pyright engines/excerpting/src/phase3_deterministic.py engines/excerpting/src/phase3_enrichment.py engines/excerpting/src/phase3_consensus.py engines/excerpting/src/phase3_validation.py
Report any type errors to overnight/results/pyright-phase3/summary.md.
Do NOT modify any files.

tasks.name: Phase 1 edge case hardening tests
tasks.prompt:
TASK: Write additional edge case tests for Phase 1 (deterministic assembly).

Read engines/excerpting/CLAUDE.md. Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md section 4.
Read existing tests in engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase1_*.py to understand current coverage.

Write NEW test file: engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase1_hardening.py with edge cases:
1. Empty division (no content units)
2. Single-word content unit
3. Division at exact MAX_CHUNK_WORDS boundary (5000 words)
4. Content unit with only footnotes, no text
5. Mixed Arabic/Latin text assembly
6. Division with maximum nesting depth
7. Consecutive divisions with same heading
8. Content unit with ZWNJ characters

Use conftest factories. Use real Arabic where possible.
Run: python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -x -v --tb=short
All tests must pass.

tasks.name: Phase 2 edge case hardening tests
tasks.prompt:
TASK: Write additional edge case tests for Phase 2 (LLM classification + grouping).

Read engines/excerpting/CLAUDE.md. Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md section 5.
Read existing tests in engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase2_*.py.

Write NEW test file: engines/excerpting/tests/test_phase2_hardening.py with edge cases:
1. Offset normalization: snippet with ZWNJ character
2. Offset normalization: snippet at exact boundary between tokens
3. Classification with single segment covering all text
4. Grouping with single unit covering all segments
5. Retry logic: verify error feedback NOT appended for ValidationError (DD-S2-8)
6. V-P2-14: LLM produces wildly wrong offsets (off by >100 words)
7. V-P2-15: all three containment levels with edge cases
8. Max token computation: exact boundary values (2000, 2001, 4000, 4001)

Use conftest factories. Mock the instructor client.
Run: python -m pytest engines/excerpting/tests/ -x -v --tb=short
All tests must pass.

tasks.name: Excerpting SPEC quality audit
tasks.prompt:
Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md thoroughly and audit for:
1. Rules that lack concrete examples with real Arabic text
2. Ambiguous language ('appropriate', 'reasonable', 'as needed')
3. Cross-references that may be broken or pointing to wrong line numbers
4. Untestable behavioral rules
5. Inconsistencies between §5 (Phase 2) and §7 (Phase 3)
6. Missing error codes for failure paths

Also run: python3 scripts/check_spec_quality.py engines/excerpting/SPEC.md

Write findings to overnight/results/audit-spec/summary.md

tasks.name: Verify all 29 SPEC invariants have test coverage
tasks.prompt:
Extract all invariants from engines/excerpting/SPEC.md:
- I-AC-1 through I-AC-7 (AssembledChunk invariants)
- I-CS-1 through I-CS-6 (ClassifiedSegment invariants)
- I-TU-1 through I-TU-9 (TeachingUnit invariants)
- I-ER-1 through I-ER-7 (ExcerptRecord invariants)

For each invariant, search the test files to find which test(s) exercise it.
Write a coverage matrix to overnight/results/audit-invariants/summary.md.
Flag any invariants that have NO test coverage.

tasks.name: Research for Phase 3.2/3.3 implementation
tasks.prompt:
Research preparation for upcoming Phase 3.2 (LLM enrichment) and 3.3 (consensus verification).

Read engines/excerpting/SPEC.md sections 7.2 and 7.3 for context.

1. Research: How to set up multi-provider LLM calls via OpenRouter (different model families for consensus)
2. Research: Instructor library patterns for structured enrichment with many output fields
3. Research: Best practices for Arabic topic keyword extraction
4. Identify potential gotchas for consensus between Claude and GPT-4 on Arabic text

Write findings to overnight/results/res-enrichment/summary.md

tasks.name: Final regression test after all modifications
tasks.prompt:
Run the final full test suite after all overnight modifications:
  python -m pytest engines/source/tests/ engines/normalization/tests/ engines/excerpting/tests/ -v --tb=short

Report: total tests, passed, failed, skipped.
Compare with baseline (566 source + 503 normalization + 149 excerpting = 1218 baseline).
Write report to overnight/results/val-test-final/summary.md
